messages.greeting: Hello! Welcome to {business_name}. I can help you book a {business_type} appointment. Would you like to book one now?
messages.ask_category_prompt: What type of appointment would you like? Options are: {categories}.
messages.success_message: Your appointment has been booked successfully. Your reference ID is {appointment_id}. Thank you!
messages.cancel_message: Okay, I have cancelled this booking request. Feel free to start again anytime.
messages.goodbye_message: Thank you for contacting {business_name}. Have a great day!
messages.not_understood_message: Sorry, I didn't quite understand that. Could you please repeat?
messages.reschedule_success: Your appointment {appointment_id} has been rescheduled to {appointment_date} at {appointment_time}.

questions.prompt: May I have your full name, please?
questions.retry_prompt: Sorry, that doesn't look like a valid name. Could you tell me your full name again?

questions.prompt: What's the best phone number to reach you on?
questions.retry_prompt: That doesn't look like a valid phone number. Please provide a 7 to 15 digit phone number.

questions.prompt: What date would you like to book the appointment? (e.g. 25th June or 2026-06-25)
questions.retry_prompt: I couldn't understand that date, or it is in the past. Please provide a valid future date.

questions.prompt: What time works best for you? (e.g. 2 PM or 14:00)
questions.retry_prompt: I couldn't understand that time, or it's outside working hours (09:00-18:00). Please provide a valid time.

questions.prompt: What is the purpose or reason for this appointment?
questions.retry_prompt: Could you briefly describe the purpose of your appointment?
